all.en: Dear passenger, this is an important update regarding your upcoming flight.
all.zh: 親愛的旅客，這是關於您即將搭乘航班的重要通知。

all.en: Your flight, Skyline Airlines 442, has been delayed by approximately 90 minutes.
all.zh: 您的 Skyline 航空 442 班機已延誤約 90 分鐘。

all.en: The new estimated departure time is 4:15 in the afternoon today.
all.zh: 新的預計起飛時間為今日下午四點十五分。

all.en: The flight will still depart from gate B12 at the international terminal.
all.zh: 航班仍將自國際航廈 B12 登機門起飛。

all.en: We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience that this delay may cause.
all.zh: 對此延誤可能造成的不便，我們深表歉意。

all.en: The cause of the delay is severe weather conditions at the departure airport.
all.zh: 延誤原因為出發機場的惡劣天氣。

all.en: Air traffic control has issued a temporary ground hold for safety reasons.
all.zh: 航管基於安全考量已發布臨時地面停飛指示。

all.en: Passenger safety remains our highest priority during all flight operations.
all.zh: 旅客安全在所有航班作業中始終是我們的首要考量。

all.en: Boarding is now scheduled to begin at 3:30 in the afternoon.
all.zh: 登機時間現訂於下午三點三十分開始。

all.en: Please remain near gate B12 and listen for further announcements.
all.zh: 請於 B12 登機門附近候機，並注意後續廣播。

all.en: If you require any assistance, our gate agents are happy to help.
all.zh: 如需任何協助，我們的登機門服務人員樂意為您效勞。

all.en: Complimentary refreshments are available at the gate area starting at 2 p.m.
all.zh: 登機門區自下午兩點起提供免費茶點。

all.en: Premium cabin passengers may use the Skyline Lounge in concourse B.
all.zh: 頭等與商務艙旅客可使用 B 候機廳的 Skyline 貴賓室。

all.en: Passengers with tight connections should speak with our rebooking desk.
all.zh: 轉機時間緊湊的旅客請至改票櫃台洽詢。

all.en: Our team can assist with alternate flight arrangements when available.
all.zh: 我們的團隊將協助安排替代航班（視艙位狀況）。

all.en: Hotel vouchers will be provided if your connection cannot be made tonight.
all.zh: 若今晚無法接駁轉機，將提供住宿券。

all.en: Please retain your boarding pass for any service or compensation requests.
all.zh: 請保留您的登機證，以利申請相關服務或補償。

all.en: Mobile boarding passes will be updated automatically with the new time.
all.zh: 電子登機證將自動更新為新的登機時間。

all.en: Checked baggage will be transferred to the same flight after the delay.
all.zh: 延誤後託運行李仍將轉至同一班機。

all.en: You may track real-time flight status on the Skyline mobile application.
all.zh: 您可透過 Skyline 行動應用程式查詢即時航班狀態。

all.en: Our customer care line is available 24 hours a day for further questions.
all.zh: 我們的客服專線每日 24 小時提供進一步諮詢。

all.en: Thank you very much for your patience and understanding today.
all.zh: 非常感謝您今日的耐心與體諒。

all.en: We will keep you informed of any further changes to your flight.
all.zh: 若您的航班有任何進一步變動，我們將持續通知。

all.en: We look forward to welcoming you on board very soon.
all.zh: 我們期待很快在機上歡迎您。

all.en: Elite frequent flyers may automatically receive bonus miles as compensation for this delay.
all.zh: 高階常旅客會員將自動獲得補償里程，以彌補此次延誤。

all.en: Travel insurance holders should keep all receipts for meals and incidental expenses incurred.
all.zh: 持有旅遊保險的旅客請保留所有餐飲與雜支收據。

all.en: Free high-speed Wi-Fi is available throughout the terminal building for all waiting passengers.
all.zh: 航廈內全區提供免費高速 Wi-Fi 供候機旅客使用。

all.en: Charging stations are conveniently located near every gate for your electronic devices.
all.zh: 每個登機門附近均設有充電站，便於旅客為電子裝置充電。

all.en: Families traveling with young children may use our priority seating area near gate B10.
all.zh: 攜帶幼童的家庭旅客可使用 B10 登機門旁的優先候機區。

all.en: Special meal requests have been confirmed and will be served once the flight is airborne.
all.zh: 特殊餐點需求已確認，航班起飛後將供應。

all.en: Pet owners with cabin animals should report to the gate counter before boarding begins.
all.zh: 攜帶機艙寵物的旅客請於登機前至登機門櫃台辦理。

all.en: Reduced-mobility passengers will receive priority boarding assistance from our cabin crew.
all.zh: 行動不便旅客將獲得空服員的優先登機協助。

all.en: Our gate agent will release any unclaimed upgrade seats fifteen minutes before departure.
all.zh: 登機門服務人員將於起飛前十五分鐘釋出未認領的升等座位。

all.en: Once again, we appreciate your cooperation and wish you a comfortable journey ahead.
all.zh: 再次感謝您的配合，並祝您旅途舒適愉快。
